creator: kirill@drlebedev.com
text:
Created attachment 255429
Patch file to v24.11.21

Xray Version update to v24.11.21

XRay port patch.

Port changes:
* Xray version is updated to the current v24.11.21
* GeoData and SiteData DBs updated to the latest
* The Build Go version was updated to 1.23.
* go.mod source switched to GitHub as golang proxy version is broken.

Testing done:
* All build/install Make subcommand
* portlint -C is clear
* portclippy - with one unknown parameter is clean
* poudriere build is successful with no errors
